name: Coffee

pros.title: strong misc-category fit
pros.explanation: Coffee is still fundamentally judged by effects and use-case rather than nutrient composition.

pros.title: strong alertness effect
pros.explanation: This is the main real-world reason coffee matters in this category.

pros.title: usually near-zero calories plain
pros.explanation: Very clean base use-case when not loaded with extras.

cons.title: caffeine tradeoffs are real
cons.explanation: Sleep disruption, jitters, and overuse risk stop this from being a clean automatic S.

cons.title: habit dependence can creep in
cons.explanation: A stronger practical downside than green tea usually carries.

cons.title: people often ruin it with sugary add-ins
cons.explanation: The practical version consumed is not always the clean black-coffee version.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
This misc example is judged mostly by context/effects rather than composition.
